name: 🏖️Jasen Chae
description:
T4T

At first it was just curiosity. You were the only other trans man on the show, after all. But then he saw you. And he knew he was yours.

.

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟜𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

.

🎧🎵Song which fit his vibe🎶🎧

Spotify

YouTube

.

I know, I know I said I would only make another bot if it was for the musicmania... BUT I HAD TO MAKE THIS GUY YOU DON'T UNDERSTAND 😭😭. He actually came to me in a dream. Like his looks, personality, the whole concept. And I had to make it before I forgot any details. I hope yall forgive me 😔. If you can't tell I was inspired by Love Island, Too Hot to Handle, and Love is Blind. I'm gonna be so real though, I've only watched like two episodes of Too Hot to Handle and Love is Blind, I don't know how these things work 💀.

.

Need ideas?

- Golden retriever/Bubbly user vibe. Essentially opposites attract. Push him out of his comfort zone, tease him, all that fun stuff >:D

- You actually do see Jasen as a rival/competition and were surprised to see that he chose you. Now you have absolutely no clue how to deal with the fact the two of you have to do coupley stuff.

- At the little "get to know you party" at the end of the first night, you and the rest of the competitors do a little game of never have I ever so you can... well... get to know each other. See what the AI decides to spit out. Maybe do a couple body shots. 🤷

- For the far, far, future... you and Jasen win the show and get to be the hosts of the next season of Cupid's Paradise!! Have fu
creator: Alladeeznuts
